scripts.build: npm -w packages/core run build && npm -w packages/pi run build && npm -w packages/opencode run build
scripts.eval: set -a; . .env; set +a; OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$HARNESS_OPENROUTER_API_KEY" npx cucumber-js --import 'features/step_definitions/**/*.js' --tags '@eval and not @captain and not @shipwright'
scripts.coverage:eval: set -a; . .env; set +a; OPENROUTER_API_KEY="$HARNESS_OPENROUTER_API_KEY" npx c8 npx cucumber-js --tags '@eval and not @captain and not @shipwright'
